## Checklist
- [ ] Tested manually in a WordPress install
- [ ] PHP follows WordPress Coding Standards
- [ ] No new external dependencies added
- [ ] User-facing strings are wrapped in `esc_html_e()` / `esc_html__()`
- [ ] If adding a new agent tool: tool definition added to `get_tool_definitions()` and handler added to `dispatch_tool()`
- [ ] `README.md` updated if new tools or features were added
